api_types.name: FileStorageSpec
api_types.doc: FileStorageSpec configures the file storage backend. Exactly one of s3 or fs must be set.

fields.name: S3
fields.doc: S3 configures S3-compatible object storage. Mutually exclusive with fs.

fields.name: FS
fields.doc: FS configures PVC-backed filesystem storage. Mutually exclusive with s3.

fields.name: Retry
fields.doc: Retry configures retry behaviour for transient file storage errors.

markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="has(self.s3) != has(self.fs)",message="exactly one of fileStorage.s3 or fileStorage.fs must be set"

api_types.name: S3StorageSpec
api_types.doc: S3StorageSpec configures S3-compatible object storage access. The secret access key must be provided via spec.secretRef (key: s3-secret-access-key).

fields.name: Region
fields.doc: Region is the AWS region (e.g. "us-east-1").

fields.name: Endpoint
fields.doc: Endpoint overrides the S3 endpoint URL for non-AWS providers (e.g. MinIO).

fields.name: AccessKeyID
fields.doc: AccessKeyID is the S3 access key ID (non-sensitive). The corresponding secret access key must be provided via spec.secretRef.

fields.name: Prefix
fields.doc: Prefix is an optional key prefix applied to all objects written to the bucket.

fields.name: UsePathStyle
fields.doc: UsePathStyle forces path-style addressing (required by some S3-compatible stores).

fields.name: AutoCreateBucket
fields.doc: AutoCreateBucket causes the operator to create the bucket if it does not exist.

api_types.name: FSStorageSpec
api_types.doc: FSStorageSpec configures PVC-backed filesystem storage.

fields.name: BasePath
fields.doc: BasePath is the root directory inside the PVC where files are stored.

fields.name: ClaimName
fields.doc: ClaimName is the name of the PersistentVolumeClaim to mount.

api_types.name: FileRetrySpec
api_types.doc: FileRetrySpec configures retry behaviour for transient file storage errors.

fields.name: MaxRetries
fields.doc: MaxRetries is the maximum number of retry attempts.

fields.name: InitialBackoff
fields.doc: InitialBackoff is the wait duration before the first retry (e.g. "1s").

fields.name: MaxBackoff
fields.doc: MaxBackoff is the maximum wait duration between retries (e.g. "10s").

api_types.name: APIServerSpec
api_types.doc: APIServerSpec configures the HTTP API server component.

fields.name: Replicas
fields.doc: Replicas is the desired number of API server pods. Setting this to 0 suspends the API server; the Ready condition will be False.

fields.name: Resources
fields.doc: Resources defines CPU and memory requests/limits for the API server container.

fields.name: Config
fields.doc: Config holds fine-grained API server configuration.

fields.name: ImagePullPolicy
fields.doc: ImagePullPolicy overrides the image pull policy for the API server container. Useful for development workflows where the image is loaded directly into the cluster node.

api_types.name: APIServerConfigSpec
api_types.doc: APIServerConfigSpec holds fine-grained configuration for the API server process.

fields.name: Port
fields.doc: Port is the TCP port the API server listens on.

fields.name: ObservabilityPort
fields.doc: ObservabilityPort is the TCP port that exposes metrics and health endpoints.

fields.name: ReadTimeoutSeconds
fields.doc: ReadTimeoutSeconds is the maximum duration for reading an entire HTTP request.

fields.name: WriteTimeoutSeconds
fields.doc: WriteTimeoutSeconds is the maximum duration before timing out writes of the response.

fields.name: IdleTimeoutSeconds
fields.doc: IdleTimeoutSeconds is the maximum amount of time to wait for the next request.

fields.name: BatchAPI
fields.doc: BatchAPI configures the batch job submission endpoint behaviour.

fields.name: FileAPI
fields.doc: FileAPI configures the file upload/download endpoint behaviour.

fields.name: EnablePprof
fields.doc: EnablePprof enables the Go pprof profiling HTTP endpoints.

fields.name: Logging
fields.doc: Logging configures log verbosity for the API server.

api_types.name: LLMBatchGateway
api_types.doc: LLMBatchGateway is the Schema for the llmbatchgateways API. It represents a fully-managed deployment of the LLM-D batch gateway, consisting of an API server, a request processor and a garbage-collector.

fields.name: Spec
fields.doc: Spec defines the desired state of LLMBatchGateway.

fields.name: Status
fields.doc: Status defines the observed state of LLMBatchGateway.

api_types.name: BatchAPIConfig
api_types.doc: BatchAPIConfig configures the batch job submission API behaviour.

fields.name: EventTTLSeconds
fields.doc: EventTTLSeconds is how long job events are retained before expiry.

fields.name: PassThroughHeaders
fields.doc: PassThroughHeaders is a list of HTTP request headers forwarded to the inference backend.

api_types.name: FileAPIConfig
api_types.doc: FileAPIConfig configures the file upload/download API behaviour.

fields.name: DefaultExpirationSeconds
fields.doc: DefaultExpirationSeconds is the default TTL for uploaded files.

fields.name: MaxSizeBytes
fields.doc: MaxSizeBytes is the maximum allowed size of a single uploaded file.

fields.name: MaxLineCount
fields.doc: MaxLineCount is the maximum number of lines allowed in a JSONL batch input file.

api_types.name: LoggingConfig
api_types.doc: LoggingConfig configures log verbosity.

fields.name: Verbosity
fields.doc: Verbosity sets the log verbosity level (higher means more verbose).

api_types.name: ProcessorSpec
api_types.doc: ProcessorSpec configures the request-processing worker component.

fields.name: Replicas
fields.doc: Replicas is the desired number of processor pods. Setting this to 0 suspends the processor; the Ready condition will be False.

fields.name: Resources
fields.doc: Resources defines CPU and memory requests/limits for the processor container.

fields.name: ImagePullPolicy
fields.doc: ImagePullPolicy overrides the image pull policy for the processor container. Useful for development workflows where the image is loaded directly into the cluster node.

fields.name: GlobalInferenceGateway
fields.doc: GlobalInferenceGateway is the default inference gateway used for all models unless overridden by a ModelGateways entry.

fields.name: ModelGateways
fields.doc: ModelGateways maps model names to per-model inference gateway configurations, overriding GlobalInferenceGateway for those models.

fields.name: Config
fields.doc: Config holds fine-grained processor configuration.

api_types.name: InferenceGatewaySpec
api_types.doc: InferenceGatewaySpec configures a connection to an inference gateway.

fields.name: URL
fields.doc: URL is the base URL of the inference gateway (e.g. "http://gateway.svc:8000").

fields.name: RequestTimeout
fields.doc: RequestTimeout is the maximum time to wait for a single inference response (e.g. "5m").

fields.name: MaxRetries
fields.doc: MaxRetries is the maximum number of retry attempts on transient errors.

fields.name: InitialBackoff
fields.doc: InitialBackoff is the wait duration before the first retry (e.g. "500ms").

fields.name: MaxBackoff
fields.doc: MaxBackoff is the maximum wait duration between retries (e.g. "30s").

fields.name: TLSInsecureSkipVerify
fields.doc: TLSInsecureSkipVerify disables TLS certificate verification. Not recommended for production.

fields.name: TLSCACertFile
fields.doc: TLSCACertFile is the path to a custom CA certificate file for verifying the gateway's TLS certificate.

fields.name: TLSClientCertFile
fields.doc: TLSClientCertFile is the path to the client TLS certificate file for mutual TLS.

fields.name: TLSClientKeyFile
fields.doc: TLSClientKeyFile is the path to the client TLS private key file for mutual TLS.

markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!has(self.tlsInsecureSkipVerify) || !self.tlsInsecureSkipVerify",message="tlsInsecureSkipVerify is not allowed; configure trusted CA certificates instead"

api_types.name: AIMDConfig
api_types.doc: AIMDConfig holds parameters for Additive Increase / Multiplicative Decrease adaptive concurrency control per inference endpoint.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.doc: Enabled controls whether AIMD adaptive concurrency is active. When false, per-endpoint concurrency is fixed at ConcurrencyConfig.PerEndpoint.

fields.name: Min
fields.doc: Min is the floor for per-endpoint adaptive concurrency. AIMD will never reduce a single endpoint's effective limit below this value.

fields.name: BackoffFactor
fields.doc: BackoffFactor is the multiplicative decrease applied to the per-endpoint concurrency limit when the endpoint signals overload (429/5xx). Must be a decimal in (0, 1), e.g. "0.5".

fields.name: AdditiveIncrease
fields.doc: AdditiveIncrease is the number of concurrency slots added after a full window of consecutive successes per endpoint.

api_types.name: LLMBatchGatewayList
api_types.doc: LLMBatchGatewayList contains a list of LLMBatchGateway.

api_types.name: ConcurrencyConfig
api_types.doc: ConcurrencyConfig groups the dispatch-rate and concurrency control knobs.

fields.name: Global
fields.doc: Global limits total in-flight inference requests across all workers. Acts as a fixed ceiling — the sum of all per-endpoint concurrency is bounded by this value.

fields.name: PerEndpoint
fields.doc: PerEndpoint is the initial and maximum concurrency per inference endpoint.

fields.name: Recovery
fields.doc: Recovery limits concurrent job recoveries during startup.

fields.name: AIMD
fields.doc: AIMD holds adaptive concurrency control parameters.

api_types.name: ProcessorConfigSpec
api_types.doc: ProcessorConfigSpec holds fine-grained configuration for the processor process.

fields.name: NumWorkers
fields.doc: NumWorkers is the number of concurrent worker goroutines processing jobs.

fields.name: Concurrency
fields.doc: Concurrency groups all dispatch-rate and concurrency control knobs.

fields.name: InferenceObjective
fields.doc: InferenceObjective specifies the scheduling objective (e.g. "throughput", "latency").

fields.name: DefaultOutputExpirationSeconds
fields.doc: DefaultOutputExpirationSeconds is the TTL for job output files.

fields.name: ProgressTTLSeconds
fields.doc: ProgressTTLSeconds is how long in-progress job state is retained before being considered stale.

fields.name: EnablePprof
fields.doc: EnablePprof enables the Go pprof profiling HTTP endpoints.

fields.name: Logging
fields.doc: Logging configures log verbosity for the processor.

api_types.name: GCSpec
api_types.doc: GCSpec configures the garbage-collector component.

fields.name: Interval
fields.doc: Interval is how often the GC runs (e.g. "30m").

fields.name: Config
fields.doc: Config holds fine-grained GC configuration.

fields.name: ImagePullPolicy
fields.doc: ImagePullPolicy overrides the image pull policy for the GC container. Useful for development workflows where the image is loaded directly into the cluster node.

api_types.name: GCConfigSpec
api_types.doc: GCConfigSpec holds fine-grained configuration for the garbage-collector process.

fields.name: DryRun
fields.doc: DryRun causes the GC to log what it would delete without actually deleting anything.

fields.name: MaxConcurrency
fields.doc: MaxConcurrency is the maximum number of deletion operations performed in parallel.

fields.name: Logging
fields.doc: Logging configures log verbosity for the GC.

api_types.name: LLMBatchGatewaySpec
api_types.doc: LLMBatchGatewaySpec defines the desired state of the batch gateway deployment.

fields.name: SecretRef
fields.doc: SecretRef references the Kubernetes Secret that holds runtime credentials (database URL, S3 keys, inference API key, etc.). When Namespace is omitted the Secret must reside in the same namespace as the LLMBatchGateway CR. When Namespace is set to a different namespace, a Gateway API ReferenceGrant must exist in that namespace permitting this LLMBatchGateway to reference the Secret. The controller will copy the Secret into the CR's namespace under a managed name (<gateway-name>-credentials) so that the workload Pods can mount it. SecretRef is immutable after creation. To use a different Secret, delete and recreate the LLMBatchGateway CR.

fields.name: DBBackend
fields.doc: DBBackend selects the database backend used for job state storage.

fields.name: FileStorage
fields.doc: FileStorage configures the file storage backend used to persist batch input/output files. If omitted, S3 defaults are used.

fields.name: APIServer
fields.doc: APIServer configures the HTTP API server component.

fields.name: Processor
fields.doc: Processor configures the request-processing worker component.

fields.name: GC
fields.doc: GC configures the garbage-collector component that expires old jobs and files.

fields.name: Monitoring
fields.doc: Monitoring enables Prometheus ServiceMonitor and PodMonitor resources.

fields.name: Grafana
fields.doc: Grafana enables the bundled Grafana dashboard ConfigMap.

fields.name: TLS
fields.doc: TLS configures TLS termination for the API server.

fields.name: HTTPRoute
fields.doc: HTTPRoute configures a Gateway API HTTPRoute resource to expose the API server.

fields.name: OTEL
fields.doc: OTEL configures OpenTelemetry tracing for all components.

fields.name: PrometheusRule
fields.doc: PrometheusRule configures a PrometheusRule resource with pre-built alerting rules.

api_types.name: MonitoringSpec
api_types.doc: MonitoringSpec enables Prometheus monitoring resources.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.doc: Enabled controls whether a ServiceMonitor and PodMonitor are created for each component.

api_types.name: GrafanaSpec
api_types.doc: GrafanaSpec enables the bundled Grafana dashboard.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.doc: Enabled controls whether a Grafana dashboard ConfigMap is created.

api_types.name: PrometheusRuleSpec
api_types.doc: PrometheusRuleSpec configures a PrometheusRule resource with pre-built alerting rules.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.doc: Enabled controls whether a PrometheusRule resource is created.

fields.name: Labels
fields.doc: Labels are additional labels applied to the PrometheusRule resource, used to match Prometheus operator rule selectors.

api_types.name: OTELSpec
api_types.doc: OTELSpec configures OpenTelemetry tracing for all components.

fields.name: Endpoint
fields.doc: Endpoint is the OTLP gRPC or HTTP endpoint (e.g. "http://collector:4317").

fields.name: Insecure
fields.doc: Insecure disables TLS for the OTLP connection.

fields.name: Sampler
fields.doc: Sampler is the OTEL sampler type (e.g. "parentbased_traceidratio").

fields.name: SamplerArg
fields.doc: SamplerArg is the argument passed to the sampler (e.g. "0.1" for 10% sampling).

fields.name: RedisTracing
fields.doc: RedisTracing enables tracing of Redis operations.

fields.name: PostgresqlTracing
fields.doc: PostgresqlTracing enables tracing of PostgreSQL operations.

api_types.name: TLSSpec
api_types.doc: TLSSpec configures TLS termination for the API server.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.doc: Enabled controls whether TLS termination is configured for the API server.

fields.name: SecretName
fields.doc: SecretName is the name of an existing TLS Secret (type kubernetes.io/tls) containing the certificate and key. Mutually exclusive with certManager.

fields.name: CertManager
fields.doc: CertManager configures automatic certificate provisioning via cert-manager. Mutually exclusive with secretName.

markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!self.enabled || size(self.secretName) > 0 || has(self.certManager)",message="tls.secretName or tls.certManager must be set when tls.enabled is true"

api_types.name: CertManagerSpec
api_types.doc: CertManagerSpec configures automatic certificate provisioning via cert-manager.

fields.name: IssuerName
fields.doc: IssuerName is the name of the cert-manager Issuer or ClusterIssuer.

fields.name: IssuerKind
fields.doc: IssuerKind is the kind of the cert-manager issuer resource.

fields.name: DNSNames
fields.doc: DNSNames is the list of DNS SANs to include in the issued certificate.

api_types.name: HTTPRouteSpec
api_types.doc: HTTPRouteSpec configures a Gateway API HTTPRoute to expose the API server.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.doc: Enabled controls whether an HTTPRoute resource is created.

fields.name: Annotations
fields.doc: Annotations are extra annotations applied to the HTTPRoute resource.

fields.name: ParentRefs
fields.doc: ParentRefs is the list of Gateways this HTTPRoute should attach to. +listType=atomic

api_types.name: ParentReference
api_types.doc: ParentReference identifies a Gateway to which an HTTPRoute should attach.

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: Name is the name of the Gateway resource.

fields.name: Namespace
fields.doc: Namespace is the namespace of the Gateway resource. Defaults to the HTTPRoute's namespace.

fields.name: SectionName
fields.doc: SectionName is the name of a specific listener on the Gateway to attach to.

api_types.name: LLMBatchGatewayStatus
api_types.doc: LLMBatchGatewayStatus defines the observed state of LLMBatchGateway.

fields.name: ObservedGeneration
fields.doc: ObservedGeneration is the .metadata.generation that was last processed by the controller.

fields.name: Conditions
fields.doc: Conditions represent the latest available observations of the LLMBatchGateway's state. Known condition types: Ready, APIServerAvailable, ProcessorAvailable, GCAvailable.

fields.name: ComponentStatus
fields.doc: ComponentStatus reports the replica counts for each managed component.

api_types.name: ComponentStatus
api_types.doc: ComponentStatus reports the replica status of each managed component.

fields.name: APIServer
fields.doc: APIServer reports the replica status of the API server Deployment.

fields.name: Processor
fields.doc: Processor reports the replica status of the processor Deployment.

fields.name: GC
fields.doc: GC reports the replica status of the garbage-collector Deployment.

api_types.name: ComponentReplicaStatus
api_types.doc: ComponentReplicaStatus reports the desired and ready replica counts for a Deployment.

fields.name: Replicas
fields.doc: Replicas is the total number of non-terminated pods.

fields.name: ReadyReplicas
fields.doc: ReadyReplicas is the number of pods that have passed their readiness checks.

operator_config.name: managedSecretSuffix
operator_config.doc:
managedSecretSuffix is appended to the LLMBatchGateway name to form the
name of the controller-managed Secret copy in the CR's namespace.

prometheus_metrics.name: llmbatchgateway_controller_reconcile_errors_total
prometheus_metrics.help: Total number of reconciliation errors, partitioned by error type.

summary: llm-d-batch-gateway-operator is a Kubernetes component. managing 1 CRD(s): LLMBatchGateway. deploying 1 workload(s) (llm-d-batch-gateway-operator) with 1 container(s). watching 9 resource type(s). defining 19 API spec type(s) across 30 struct(s) with 118 total fields. with 9 operator config constants. exposing 1 Prometheus metrics. reporting 4 status condition types. with 1 ingress route(s).
